title: Outlook integration - changed account settings - how to in Monday?

posts.author: Christophe (SC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have changed my buisness outlook password, since then, Monday notifies me that the integration was deactivated due to changes in my Outlook account:

When i move to the automation and click on the “here” link, it opens a new view that remains empty. I can’t manage to find a way to change the password of my utlook account inthere.

image1247×160 21.2 KB

Can someone help?
